Excellent. Your Next.js app is now working correctly.

Now we start transforming it into the EPEW AI Platform.

STEP 1 — OPEN THE NEW PROJECT

In VS Code:

epew-ai

This is now your MAIN future platform.

STEP 2 — INSTALL REQUIRED PACKAGES

Bash
npm install ai @ai-sdk/openai react-icons

Later we’ll add:

  • Supabase

STEP 3 — CLEAN THE DEFAULT PAGE

Open:

src/app/page.tsx

DELETE EVERYTHING inside.

Replace with this FULL code:

TypeScript
export default function HomePage() {
  return (
    <main className="min-h-screen bg-[#f5f7fb]">

      {/* NAVBAR */}

      <nav className="w-full bg-[#062b66] text-white px-10 py-5 flex items-center justify-between">

        <h1 className="text-5xl font-bold">
          EPEW
        </h1>

        <div className="flex gap-8 text-xl font-medium">
          <a href="#">Home</a>
          <a href="#">About</a>
          <a href="#">How It Works</a>
          <a href="#">Apply</a>
          <a href="#">Become Supporter</a>
        </div>

        <button className="bg-white text-[#062b66] px-6 py-3 rounded-2xl font-bold text-xl">
          Login
        </button>

      </nav>

      {/* HERO */}

      <section className="max-w-[1400px] mx-auto px-10 py-20 grid lg:grid-cols-2 gap-12 items-center">

        <div>

          <h2 className="text-7xl font-extrabold text-[#062b66] leading-tight mb-8">
            Empowering Entrepreneurs.
            <br />
            Building Wealth.
          </h2>

          <p className="text-2xl text-gray-700 leading-relaxed mb-10">
            EPEW provides the structure,
            coaching, support, and funding
            ecosystem entrepreneurs need to
            build sustainable businesses and
            create long-term community impact.
          </p>

          <div className="flex gap-6 flex-wrap">

            <button className="bg-[#062b66] text-white px-10 py-5 rounded-2xl text-2xl font-bold shadow-lg hover:scale-105 transition">
              Join The Program
            </button>

            <button className="bg-white border-2 border-[#d4af37] text-[#062b66] px-10 py-5 rounded-2xl text-2xl font-bold shadow-lg hover:scale-105 transition">
              Watch Video
            </button>

          </div>

        </div>

        <div>

          <img
            src="/images/home-hero.png"
            alt="EPEW Hero"
            className="w-full rounded-3xl shadow-2xl"
          />

        </div>

      </section>

    </main>
  );
}

STEP 4 — CREATE IMAGE FOLDER

Inside:

public

Create:

images

Move your image:

home-hero.png

into:

public/images

STEP 5 — TEST

Save everything.

The homepage should immediately become the new EPEW landing page.

Then send me the result screenshot.

Next we will:

The VS code was close. How to reopen it?

ChatGPT said:

On Mac, easiest ways:

Option 1 — From Finder

  1. Open Finder

  2. Go to:

/Users/clairecasseus/Desktop/EPEW/EPEW PLATFORM

  1. Open the folder:

epew-ai

  1. Right click the folder

  2. Choose:

Open With → Visual Studio Code

Option 2 — From Terminal

In terminal:

Bash
cd epew-ai
code .

If code . does not work:

Open VS Code manually first.

Then:

  • Press:

Cmd + Shift + P

  • Type:

Shell Command: Install 'code' command in PATH

  • Press Enter

Then retry:

Bash
code .

Option 3 — Open Recent

Open Visual Studio Code.

Top menu:

File → Open Recent → epew-ai

You said:

Can I open it from Versel directly?

ChatGPT said:

Yes — but not the way you are thinking yet.

Right now the project exists only on your computer locally.

To open/edit it from Vercel directly, you first need to:

  1. Push the project to GitHub

  2. Connect GitHub to Vercel

  3. Deploy the app

THEN Vercel can manage/deploy it automatically.

FASTEST PATH

STEP 1 — Open VS Code again locally

Run:

Bash
cd epew-ai
code .

STEP 2 — Create GitHub repository

Go to:

GitHub

Create new repository:

epew-ai

STEP 3 — Push project to GitHub

Inside terminal:

Bash
git init
git add .
git commit -m "Initial EPEW AI Platform"

Then connect GitHub:

Bash
git remote add origin YOUR_GITHUB_REPO_URL
git branch -M main
git push -u origin main

STEP 4 — Connect to Vercel

Go to:

Vercel

  1. Import Project

  2. Choose GitHub repo:

epew-ai

  1. Deploy

Vercel will automatically:

  • build

  • host

  • create live URL

  • auto-update after every push

IMPORTANT

Vercel is mainly:

  • deployment

  • hosting

  • serverless functions

  • AI SDK

  • analytics

VS Code is still your main editor.

Later you can also use:

  • Vercel AI templates

  • v0.dev

  • GitHub Codespaces

  • Cursor AI

  • Windsurf AI

to speed development even more.


You said:

Where to import projet. I can create not import

ChatGPT said:

You are already very close.

Vercel only shows “Import Project” AFTER the project exists on GitHub.

Right now:

  • your local app exists

  • Vercel account exists

  • BUT the new epew-ai project is NOT on GitHub yet

So first we push it to GitHub.

DO THIS NOW

Open terminal inside:

epew-ai

Run these commands ONE BY ONE:

Bash
git init

then:

Bash
git add .

then:

Bash
git commit -m "Initial EPEW AI Platform"

THEN CREATE GITHUB REPOSITORY

Go to:

GitHub New Repository

Repository name:

epew-ai

Make it:

  • Public for now

  • Do NOT initialize README

Create repository.

AFTER GITHUB CREATES IT

GitHub will show commands like:

Bash
git remote add origin https://github.com/USERNAME/epew-ai.git
git branch -M main
git push -u origin main

COPY and run those inside terminal.

THEN GO BACK TO VERCEL

Now you will finally see:

Import Git Repository

Then:

  1. Click “Add New”

  2. Choose:

Project

  1. Select:

epew-ai

  1. Deploy

After that:

  • every GitHub push auto-deploys

  • your EPEW AI platform becomes live online

  • we can build production features much faster


You said:


ChatGPT said:

That is okay.

Use the existing GitHub repo URL.

In terminal, run:

Bash
git remote remove origin

Then add the real existing repo URL:

Bash
git remote add origin https://github.com/YOUR-USERNAME/epew-ai.git

Then push:

Bash
git branch -M main
git push -u origin main

If GitHub says the repo already has files, use:

Bash
git pull origin main --allow-unrelated-histories
git push -u origin main

ChatGPT said:

Good. Use this exact remote:

Bash
git remote remove origin
git remote add origin https://github.com/snamuelson26/epew-ai.git
git branch -M main
git push -u origin main

ChatGPT said:

Replace EVERYTHING inside app/page.tsx with this full code:

TypeScript
export default function Home() {
  return (
    <main className="min-h-screen bg-white">

      {/* NAVBAR */}
      <nav className="w-full bg-[#062b66] text-white px-8 py-5 flex items-center justify-between">
        <h1 className="text-4xl font-bold">EPEW</h1>

        <div className="flex gap-8 text-xl font-medium">
          <a href="#">Home</a>
          <a href="#">About</a>
          <a href="#">How It Works</a>
          <a href="#">Apply</a>
          <a href="#">Become Supporter</a>
        </div>

        <button className="bg-white text-[#062b66] px-6 py-3 rounded-xl font-bold text-xl">
          Login
        </button>
      </nav>

      {/* HERO SECTION */}
      <section className="relative">

        <img
          src="/hero.jpg"
          alt="EPEW Hero"
          className="w-full object-cover"
        />

        <div className="absolute top-[18%] left-[6%] max-w-3xl">

          <h1 className="text-7xl font-bold text-[#062b66] leading-tight">
            Empowering Entrepreneurs.
            <br />
            Building Wealth.
          </h1>

          <p className="text-2xl text-gray-700 mt-8 leading-relaxed">
            Ekero Partners Empower Wealth (EPEW) provides the
            structure, guidance, and support entrepreneurs need
            to build sustainable businesses and create lasting
            impact in their communities.
          </p>

          <div className="flex gap-6 mt-10 flex-wrap">

            <button className="bg-[#062b66] hover:bg-[#041d46] text-white px-10 py-5 rounded-2xl text-2xl font-bold shadow-lg transition">
              Join the Program
            </button>

            <a
              href="/video"
              className="bg-white border-2 border-[#d4af37] text-[#062b66] px-10 py-5 rounded-2xl text-2xl font-bold shadow-lg transition"
            >
              ▶ Watch Video
            </a>

          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      {/* FEATURE SECTION */}
      <section className="bg-[#062b66] py-16 px-8">

        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto bg-white rounded-3xl shadow-2xl grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 overflow-hidden">

          {/* CARD 1 */}
          <div className="p-10 border-r border-gray-200">
            <div className="text-[#062b66] text-6xl mb-6">👥</div>

            <h3 className="text-3xl font-bold text-[#062b66] mb-4">
              Coaching & Guidance
            </h3>

            <p className="text-gray-700 text-xl leading-relaxed">
              One-on-one coaching to help entrepreneurs
              build a strong business foundation.
            </p>
          </div>

          {/* CARD 2 */}
          <div className="p-10 border-r border-gray-200">
            <div className="text-[#062b66] text-6xl mb-6">📘</div>

            <h3 className="text-3xl font-bold text-[#062b66] mb-4">
              Training & Resources
            </h3>

            <p className="text-gray-700 text-xl leading-relaxed">
              Access practical tools, training,
              and business development resources.
            </p>
          </div>

          {/* CARD 3 */}
          <div className="p-10 border-r border-gray-200">
            <div className="text-[#062b66] text-6xl mb-6">🌍</div>

            <h3 className="text-3xl font-bold text-[#062b66] mb-4">
              Community & Networking
            </h3>

            <p className="text-gray-700 text-xl leading-relaxed">
              Connect with entrepreneurs,
              supporters, and industry leaders.
            </p>
          </div>

          {/* CARD 4 */}
          <div className="p-10">
            <div className="text-[#062b66] text-6xl mb-6">📈</div>

            <h3 className="text-3xl font-bold text-[#062b66] mb-4">
              Growth & Impact
            </h3>

            <p className="text-gray-700 text-xl leading-relaxed">
              Build sustainable businesses and
              create long-term community impact.
            </p>
          </div>

        </div>

        {/* BUTTONS */}
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto flex flex-wrap gap-6 justify-center mt-10">

          <button className="bg-[#062b66] text-white px-12 py-5 rounded-2xl text-2xl font-bold shadow-lg">
            Join the Program
          </button>

          <a
            href="/video"
            className="bg-white border-2 border-[#d4af37] text-[#062b66] px-12 py-5 rounded-2xl text-2xl font-bold shadow-lg"
          >
            Watch Video
          </a>

          <button className="bg-green-600 text-white px-12 py-5 rounded-2xl text-2xl font-bold shadow-lg">
            Become a Supporter
          </button>

          <button className="bg-white border-2 border-[#062b66] text-[#062b66] px-12 py-5 rounded-2xl text-2xl font-bold shadow-lg">
            Learn More
          </button>

        </div>

      </section>

    </main>
  );
}

STEP 1 — OPEN TERMINAL

Bash

app

then click:

page.tsx
